case_title: MEPT ST.,MATTHEWS LLC VS. HELLER EHRMAN LLP et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEPT ST.,MATTHEWS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HELLER EHRMAN LLP DOES 1-30 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-27-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-29-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-12-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEPT ST.,MATTHEWS LLC SERVED OCT-31-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HELLER EHRMAN LLP

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-11-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-27-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-11-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
